items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Two poached eggs served on a toasted english muffin, with peameal bacon or applewood smoked bacon, and hollandaise sauce. Served with crispy potato barrels and fresh fruit.

items.name: Loaded Strawberry French Toast
items.description: Thick sliced bread dipped in a vanilla egg mix, fried and tossed in cinnamon sugar. Topped with caramel, strawberry sauce, fresh strawberries and whipped cream. Served with syrup.

items.name: Avocado Toast
items.description: Grilled 9-grain bread, swiss cheese, avocado, sautéed spinach, tomato and two poached eggs. Served with hollandaise sauce, crispy potato barrels and fresh fruit.

items.name: Lobster Benedict
items.description:
Two poached eggs served on a toasted english muffin with lobster meat and hollandaise sauce. Served with crispy potato barrels and fresh fruit.

items.simplified_description: Poached eggs on a muffin with lobster and sauce, served with potatoes and fruit.
